name: harness-plugin
description: Bootstrap or migrate repositories into an agent-first harness proposal with migration maps, layered architecture docs, and optional runtime and observability capability packs

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap or migrate a repository into an agent-first harness proposal.
interface.longDescription: Scaffold a harness proposal with migration maps, layered architecture docs, Provider guidance, knowledge-base maintenance, and optional runtime/UI validation and observability capability packs.
defaultPrompt: Use harness-plugin in bootstrap mode for this new repo.
Use harness-init style migration mode for this existing repo.
Add runtime/UI validation and observability packs, but preserve current telemetry where possible.
